forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: Scattered showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny. High near 70, with temperatures falling to around 67 in the afternoon. Southeast wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 2am, then a chance of rain showers and patchy fog. Mostly cloudy. Low around 49, with temperatures rising to around 51 overnight. Southeast wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
